name_en: Factory direct M57093 Launch Twist One Handle Small Handbag, featuring Taurillon leather with colored leather lining, incorporating the iconic Twist lock. Top handle and removable shoulder strap allow for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody wear. Size: 17.0 x 25.0 x 11.0 cm
